login.title: Vibez Citizens
login.emailConfirmedBody: You can now log in to your account.
login.passwordResetBody: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.
login.accountNotFoundBody: This account has been deleted. If you think this is a mistake, please contact support.

register.title: Join Vibez Citizens
register.subtitle: Create your account to get started.
register.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase and a number.
register.consentSuffix: and confirm that I am at least 18 years old.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
forgot.errorMessage: Unable to send reset email. Please try again.
forgot.cooldownMessage: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds before trying again.
